title: Shared source membership in project.yml
description: Add AggregatorApp/Common source files (APIClient.swift, KeychainHelper.swift, CredentialsStore, models Article/Thread/PaginatedResponse, DateDisplay) to a shared sources path in project.yml so the widget extension target can compile against them without a separate framework. This must be done before the entitlements verification step so the verification build links against the final shared structure. Run xcodegen generate after the change.
acceptance_criteria: project.yml lists AggregatorApp/Common (or individual files) under both AggregatorApp and AggregatorWidget target sources
A scratch Swift file in AggregatorWidget that imports APIClient or Article types compiles successfully
